name: Finwise Bancorp
summary: FinWise Bancorp is a bank holding company for FinWise Bank, which operates in traditional banking and financial technology (fintech) sectors. The Bank provides banking-as-a-service (BaaS) through Strategic Programs, a nationwide strategic relationship program serving fintech companies. It also offers SBA Section 7(a) loans as an SBA Preferred Lender, and provides Fintech Banking and Payment Solutions services. The company also operates FinWise Investment, LLC as a wholly owned subsidiary.
